creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 155415
Ports for MooseFS Master Server 2.0.61-1

The port sysutils/moosefs-master update to latest stable MooseFS version 2.0.61-1. 

We created totally new (and official) ports and we want to become the ports maintainer.

In attachment is a tarball containing ports tree for MooseFS Master Server.

And one more question: is the only way to upgrade the ports is to create a new bug on FreeBSD Bugzilla or maybe we are able to do upgrade the ports in more automated way?
